text: he's outside the door right now. won't let me leave. i'm scared
rationale: Immediate entrapment and expressed fear for safety now. Tier 1 present-moment danger.

text: he has a knife. says he'll use it if i try to leave
rationale: Weapon present with explicit threat. Imminent danger, capability and intent stated.

text: he's choking me. can't breathe
rationale: Active strangulation happening now. Tier 1 physical assault with medical danger.

text: just hit me. face is bleeding. he says he'll do it again if i call anyone
rationale: Active abuse with injury, threat of further violence, and intimidation. Immediate danger.

text: he said he's going to kill me tonight. i believe him
rationale: Explicit threat to kill with timeframe and victim assessment of credibility. Tier 1.

text: h*'s going to hit me again. it always happens after he drinks. he's drunk now
rationale: Obfuscated ('h*'). Explicit anticipation of imminent violence with stated pattern and current trigger present.

text: k*ept me locked in the bedroom. just got the door open. he's downstairs
rationale: Obfuscated ('k*ept'). Unlawful imprisonment with active danger—abuser nearby, victim just escaped confinement.

text: he's threatening to kill himself unless i stay. says he'll do it now
rationale: Suicide threat as coercive control with immediate stated timeframe. Tier 1.

text: he has a gun. i saw it. he said he'd use it on me

text: i c an't breathe. he won't let go of my neck
rationale: Obfuscated spacing. Active strangulation with respiratory distress occurring now.

text: he broke into my flat. i've barricaded the door but he's still here
rationale: Unlawful entry, active entrapment, victim in defensive position. Immediate danger.

text: my ex is outside my house. he has a hammer. threatening to smash windows

text: jst beaten me. ribs hurt. he says next time he'll break them
rationale: Obfuscated misspelling. Recent severe assault with escalation threat. Tier 1.

text: asking for a friend but she's scared he'll kill her. he keeps saying it
rationale: Obfuscated framing with first-person slips. Repeated threat-to-kill statements create credible danger.

text: he's driving to my house. says he'll burn it down if i don't answer the phone
rationale: Threat with property destruction and coercive demand. Active approach with explicit violent intent.

text: i'm afraid 2 tell him i'm leaving. what if he gets angry. he has access 2 guns
rationale: Obfuscated. Pattern of violent response with stated weapon access. Tier 1 due to imminent trigger.

text: can't get away from him tonite. he's said hed do somethin rly bad
rationale: Obfuscated informal register. Trapped with partner stating vague imminent threat. Tier 1 entrapment.

text: he's 'really angry' about me wanting to quit smoking. said he'll make me pay. hes outside

text: hes threatening to take the kids and disappear unless i come home. im scared he means it
rationale: Coercive threat using children with credible fear. Imminent danger tier 1.

text: woke up choking. hes been doing this while i sleep. tonight hes said hes going to do it until
rationale: Repeated nocturnal strangulation with escalation threat. Tier 1.

text: beating me. called 999 but he unplugged the phone. hes still here

text: hes outside the shelter. police said they cant do anything until he does something. im terrified
rationale: Victim in refuge but stalked by perpetrator. Immediate danger despite police contact.

text: he said he would kill himself and take me with him. hes got a rope. hes in the room

text: whenever i try to say no he puts his hands on me. did it again tonight and i cant get out

text: i said i was leaving and he said hed hurt himself. but then he said hed hurt me first. hes home

text: he said he'd drag me by my hair and bash my head. im trapped in the bathroom

text: my partner checked my phone. knows im talking to a crisis service. said ill regret it. hes here

text: been calling me 50+ times. threatening to hurt himself unless i answer. followed me from work

text: threw me against the wall. bleeding. wont let me call an ambulance

text: he has a gun. ive seen him hold it to his head. hes said hed use it on me too. hes here now
